children.heading: High-cost natural gas
children.label: a High-cost natural gas
children.text: No price paid in any first sale of high-cost natural gas (as defined in section 3317(c) of this title, as such section was in effect on ) may be taken into account in applying any indefinite price escalator clause (as defined in section 3315(b)(3)(B) of this title, as such section was in effect on ) with respect to any first sale of any natural gas other than high-cost natural gas (as defined in section 3317(c) of this title, as such section was in effect on ).111See References in Text note below.1January 1, 1989January 1, 1989January 1, 1989
in any sale authorized under , orsection 3362(a) of this title
pursuant to any order issued under section 3363(b), (c), (d), or (g) of this title,
